title: Bit Digital Investor Relations and Earnings Summary
text: Bit Digital has repositioned the company as a strategic asset company (SAC) centered on Ethereum and AI infrastructure. The company is beginning to exit Bitcoin mining, building a scaled ETH position, and establishing WhiteFiber as a core asset. 2025 revenue rose 5% to $113.6M, but net loss reached $84.9M amid strategic shift to ETH and AI. The company holds $888M in ETH and AI assets with shares trading at a 31% discount to mNAV. The company actively stakes about 90% of ETH holdings, earning 3%-4% yield and increasing ETH density per share. Bit Digital holds a 70% stake in WhiteFiber, an AI infrastructure company, with capacity expected to grow from 11 MW in 2025 to over 75 MW by 2026. WhiteFiber recently signed an $865 million, 10-year contract with Nscale. Management forecasts EPS turning positive by Q3 2026 with 80% revenue growth expected. The company expects the convergence of AI and Ethereum to present differentiated growth opportunities in the next two years.
